channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Missing at the World Cup: Soccer-Playing Grannies
item.description: The World Cup isn't the only global soccer event. Check out the Grannies International Football Tournament.

item.title: Trump's UFC Fights Bring Historic Spectacle to White House
item.description: Seven cage fights will be held on White House grounds to honor the nation's upcoming 250th anniversary.

item.title: Primary care doctors raise concerns over telehealth firms entering obesity drug market
item.description: Telehealth companies provide lifestyle support to help obesity drug users lose weight effectively, but employers are also interested in these services.

item.title: U.S.-led war in Iran to dominate Trump's G7 visit to France
item.description: The summit was initially planned as a meeting focused on various economic and security issues.
